questions.prompt: Where should the template live in the repo?
questions.description: Pick a directory for the standalone template app.

questions.prompt: Which SDK methods should the demo highlight?
questions.description: All six are confirmed — select any to exclude.
questions.recommendedAnswer: All six methods: readUrl, getMarkdown, extractLinks, listLogs, getOneLog, exportResponse

questions.prompt: How polished should the demo UI be?
questions.description: Minimal = single page with forms/buttons. Polished = multi-page with tabs/sections, loading states, error displays.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Polished multi-section single page — a dashboard-like page with cards for each SDK method, loading states, copy-able results.

options.label: Polished: sectioned layout with cards, loading/error states

questions.prompt: How should the template be styled?
questions.description: Squidcrawl uses shadcn/ui and Tailwind. The template could use plain Tailwind to keep deps minimal.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Tailwind CSS only — lightweight, no extra component library dependency
